name: Pennsylvania Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add celery, peppers, and onion to the skillet. Cook until tender.
3. Stir in soup, milk, sour cream, and cheese. Heat until cheese melts.
4. Combine noodles, cheese sauce, chicken, mushrooms, pimento, and seasonings in a large bowl.
5. Pour mixture into a 3-quart baking dish and top with toasted almonds.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
